sections.title: Lacking the requirements for Rum Deal

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Mornin'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any quests?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: I may have a quest, but you don't look like you'd be able to handle the kind of monsters I have problems with.

sections.title: Talking to Pirate Pete after refusing to fight the demon

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Had any luck finding someone to slay the demon?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Oh! Yes! The demon, with the oppression and stuff!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: No, not yet. Why?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Because I came to offer to help.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Atta boy!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: When I am reinstated in my rightful place, I will not be a very wealthy man, as my half-brother has squandered my family fortune.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: However, I will gladly give you every bent penny of what is left, and starve in the gutter with my many adorable children if you say you will help me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nonsense! Keep the money! I will dispose of this evil half-brother of yours and leave you what little money is left to feed your family.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Wonderful! Just pick up your diversion and we'll leave!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What diversion?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, I'll take the cash in used coins please.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Er...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Look, I think I'll wait here for someone a little more... you know...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: ...heroic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No reason. I was just in the area and I thought I would ask.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: I see...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Look, I think I'll wait here for someone a little more... you know...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: ...heroic.

sections.title: Talking to Pirate after asking him for a reward

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Oh, it's you again.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: So, what brings you down here today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've decided to help you for free! I will dispose of this evil half-brother of yours and leave you what little money is left to feed your family.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Wonderful! Just pick up your diversion and we'll leave!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What diversion?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Mornin'.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Hey...you're an adventurer, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I am!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any quests for me?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Yeah, I do, as a matter of fact!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: (Ahem.)

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: I am a poor, dispossessed nobleman, forced by circumstance to lurk in the middle of nowhere, soliciting help from passers-by.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: You see, my fiendish half-brother has seized my estates and forced me into exile.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: The simple lemon farmers suffer under his tyrannous yoke, and only a brave adventurer can lift his iron boot from the neck of the poor.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: To reclaim my lands I will need to have my family sword returned to me so that I may present it as proof of my rulership.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Will you help me find my family sword?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! Your uncorroborated sob story has touched my heart. When do we set off?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: You'll help! Wonderful!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: But, alas, my half brother has a powerful ally, the mighty demon...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Err...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Err...Barrelor!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Yes, the mighty, fearsome, tall, deadly, oaken, round demon Barrelor the Destroyer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Barrelor?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: That's what I said!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Barrelor is an awesome opponent, and to reclaim my family sword you will need to defeat him, for he guards it within the deadly Trapped Pit of Barrelor.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Wanna give it a shot?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course, I fear no demon!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Atta [boy/girl]!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: When I am reinstated in my rightful place, I will not be a very wealthy man, as my half-brother has squandered my family fortune.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: However, I will gladly give you every bent penny of what is left, and starve in the gutter with my many, many adorable children, if you say you will help me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not a chance, this sounds too dangerous.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Look, I think I'll wait here for someone a little more... you know...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: ...heroic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't think I'll help you out this time.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Look, I think I'll wait here for someone a little more... you know...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: ...heroic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do I know you?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Yes, you owe me some money.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Want a lift to Braindeath Island?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, possibly, but could I go to Mos Le'Harmless instead?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Nope. It's Braindeath island or nothing. Interested?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Want a lift to Port Phasmatys?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: All right. I'll need to use my Magical Teleporting Bottle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Magical Teleporting Bottle?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Yes. Just turn around three times, then clap your hands and say the place you want to go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This I have to see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well, here goes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: One...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Would you like a hand with your stuff? You seemed to have dropped something.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: All right. You know that it's going to cost extra to take your friend as well, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What friend?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Certainly. By the way, you have a spider in your hair.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh no! Get it out, get it out!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Sure, turn around and I'll get it for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Well I'll be more than happy to...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Egad! Did you see that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? Where?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OW!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooooh... my head...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Are you ok? You, errr...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: ...missed your mouth while drinking from a bottle. Hence the bottle-shaped bruises.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: ...slipped and slid into a brick wall.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: ...managed to fall onto my boot while I was practicing kicking.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: ...hit your head on my oars while I was rowing over.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Twice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow... I'm lucky I wasn't seriously hurt!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm getting an awful headache talking to you. Any idea why?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: No idea whatsoever.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do I get a headache every time I see you?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Well, it's possibly the weight of all of your expensive items giving you a sore back.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: As a doctor I can tell you that sometimes a bad back can manifest as a headache.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a doctor?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: I'm on a break.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Regardless, I can tell you that if you hand me your most expensive items, then the pain will disappear.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: CoughonceyouturnaroundagainCough!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was that last bit?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Nothing...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you any relation to Party Pete?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Yes I am, he's my cousin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you don't sound too happy about it. What happened?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Well, I arranged with all my friends to have a party at his place.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: But then I humiliated myself by trying to dance with the knights.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: All of them collapsed on me in a horrific, jangling pile.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: I tried to salvage the night by having all the balloons come down...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what happened?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: I didn't know that someone had swapped the balloons with cannonballs!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: The casualties were horrific...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: That was the worst fifth birthday party in the history of the world.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure it wasn't that bad.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Not according to the Official History of Gielinor!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Every edition... the pictures bring it all back...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ouch...

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Thanks [player name]!

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Please solve this for me. I have other things to be thinking about.
